constants: woman + quadruped winged dragon + fantasy house
no childlike proportions, cel shading, toy forms, or faceted low-poly presentation

candidates.delta: Broad painted values with selective surface detail
candidates.evaluation: Pass; strongest richness, but the most expensive texture and detail target

candidates.delta: Large sculptural masses, matte mineral pigments, grouped scales and construction
candidates.evaluation: Pass; clearest geometry and lowest dependence on generated microdetail

candidates.delta: Smooth geometry with compressed painted values and sparse dry-brush detail
candidates.evaluation: Pass with warning; distinctive, but generated output retained more dragon and building detail than requested

rejected.diagnosis: Initial C expressed graphic simplification as visibly faceted dragon geometry, violating ART-1
rejected.correction: Moved graphic simplification from geometry into materials and value grouping
